function r(r)return j[r+(729937+-687376)]end for r,Z in ipairs({{826169+-826168;-782893+783368};{759885-759884,928474-928103},{-898319+898691;320934+-320459}})do while do local r=math.floor local Z=table.concat local c=string.sub local F=string.char local b=table.insert local Y=type local l=string.len local Q=j local return(function(j,c,F,b,Y,l,Q,i,V,I,t,o,z,y,A,u,H,D,E,Z,n,s,N)y,o,i,t,V,s,A,n,u,Z,D,N,I,E,z,H=function(j)for r=-91495-(-91496),#j,456198+-456197 do n[j[r]]=n[j[r]]+(-984268+984269)end if F then local b({},{[r(-1013755-(-971237))]=u;[r(-372290+330067)]=j;[r(396250+-438607)]=function()return 745103+-3981782 end})end end,function(j,r)local c=y(r)local F=function(F)return Z(j,{F},r,c)end return F end,function()I=I+(-139547+139548)n[I]=869410-869409 return I end,function(j)n[j]=n[j]-(-844783+844784)if n[j]==1026568+-1026568 then n[j],A[j]=nil,nil end end,function(j,r)local c=y(r)local r,Z=419076+-419075,j[829432+-829431]while Z do n[Z],r=n[Z]-(-134123-(-134124)),(405756+-405755)+r if n[Z]==-318674+318674 then n[Z],A[Z]=nil,nil end Z=j[r]end end,function(Z,F,b,Y)local
